description:
Log in to Moodle (http://localhost/moodle) as admin (username: admin, password: Admin1234!). Create a user profile field category named "Employee Information" containing three custom fields:

- "Employee ID": Short name 'employeeid', Text input, Required: Yes, Locked: Yes.
- "Department": Short name 'department', Dropdown menu, Required: Yes, Options: Emergency Medicine, Cardiology, Nursing, Pediatrics, Radiology, Surgery, Administration.
- "Job Classification Level": Short name 'joblevel', Text input, Default value: Staff.
